mnemonics: DADS SCAB (Diagrams: Activity, Deployment, Sequence, Communication, State Machine, Component, Class, Object)
keyPoints: Use Case diagrams are supplemented by behavioral diagrams (Activity, Sequence, Communication, State Machine) and structural diagrams (Class, Object, Component, Deployment).
Activity diagrams model the workflow of a business process or operation.
Sequence and Communication diagrams show object interactions, with Sequence focusing on time order and Communication on object relationships.
commonMistakes: Confusing Sequence and Communication diagrams, as they both model interactions but with different primary focuses (time vs. relationships).
Using a State Machine diagram for simple processes where an Activity diagram would be more appropriate and less complex.
